title: Personal Disc Player Compatibility
description: [ARCHIVED] Personal disc player compatibility for your convenience. Adds support for VinURL (version 1.2.3-1.21.4) and Discs Where Discs Shouldn't Be.
body:
![Personal Disc Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/631ab432ffca6e88b9e05bd52fa9035c5b40e3f1.png)
![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cdb28a775e908ca460bb6392cb92319e24dfe04.png)

## Description
This mod adds compatibility between [Personal Disc Player](https://modrinth.com/mod/personal-disc-player) and other mods for Minecraft version 1.21-1.21.4.  As of Personal Disc Player version 1.21.5-1.3, (most) other mods' discs are compatible with Personal Disc Player without the need for this compatibility mod.

### Features:
- [VinURL](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinurl) support (version 1.21.4-1.1.0, supports VinURL version 1.2.3-1.21.4)
- [Discs Where Discs Shouldn't Be](https://modrinth.com/mod/dwdsb) support

To request support for another mod, visit our GitHub issues page.

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
